div.p: Sentinel node always exists; real data is at head->next

g.text: Simplifies code | single path for empty/non-empty
Enables atomicity | CAS only on head pointer
Becomes data | old data nodes become new sentinels
Step 4: CAS head from sentinel to next

ul.li: Old sentinel is now orphaned (retired via hazard pointers)
Node A becomes the new sentinel

div.p: REAL DATA is always at: head->next->value NEVER at: head->value (sentinel has no data)

ul.li: head is never NULL (always points to sentinel)
Empty check is simply head->next == NULL
No NULL dereference when checking head
Single code path for all cases
